styles.headline_first: Big bold headline takes the top half, mockup or visual underneath. Most common pattern — Apple's own templates use this.
styles.phone_mockup: Phone device mockup is the dominant subject (tilted / angled / floating). Real UI visible inside.
styles.lifestyle_photo: Real-world photo background (person, hand, scene) with the app screen overlaid as a phone mockup.
styles.illustration_led: Custom 3D illustration, mascot, or painterly artwork is the hero. Phone mockup is small or absent.
styles.feature_callout: Annotated screenshot — arrows, circles, badges pointing to UI features. Tutorial energy.
styles.social_proof: Reviews, ratings, testimonials, awards, user count as the centerpiece. Quote-led layout.
styles.before_after: Split-screen comparison, before/after, with-without, two-column visual. Transformation framing.
